Question: Which of the following are ⓐ counting numbers ⓑ whole numbers? $$0 , \frac{2}{3} , 2 , 9 , 11.8 , 241 , 376$$
Which of the following are ⓐ counting numbers ⓑ whole numbers? $$0 , \frac{5}{3} , 7 , 8.8 , 13 , 201$$
Use place value notation to find the value of the number modeled by the $$\text{base-10}$$ blocks shown.
Use place value notation to find the value of the number modeled by the $$\text{base-10}$$ blocks shown.
For each number, find the place value of digits listed: $$27,493,615$$ ⓐ $$2$$ ⓑ $$1$$ ⓒ $$4$$ ⓓ $$7$$ ⓔ $$5$$
Answer: ⓐ ten millions ⓑ tens ⓒ hundred thousands ⓓ millions ⓔ ones

Question: For each number, find the place value of digits listed: $$519,711,641,328$$ ⓐ $$9$$ ⓑ $$4$$ ⓒ $$2$$ ⓓ $$6$$ ⓔ $$7$$
Answer: ⓐ billions ⓑ ten thousands ⓒ tens ⓓ hundred thousands ⓔ hundred millions

Question: Name each number in words: $$9,258,137,904,061$$
Answer: nine trillion, two hundred fifty-eight billion, one hundred thirty-seven million, nine hundred four thousand, sixty-one

Question: Name each number in words: $$17,864,325,619,004$$
Answer: seventeen trillion, eight hundred sixty-four billion, three hundred twenty-five million, six hundred nineteen thousand, four

Question: The population in a country is $$316,128,839 .$$ Name that number.
Answer: three hundred sixteen million, one hundred twenty-eight thousand, eight hundred thirty-nine

Question: One year is $$31,536,000$$ seconds. Name that number.
Answer: thirty-one million, five hundred thirty-six thousand

Question: Write each number in standard form: fifty-three million, eight hundred nine thousand, fifty-one.
Write each number in standard form: two billion, twenty-two million, seven hundred fourteen thousand, four hundred sixty-six.
Write each number in standard form: The closest distance from Earth to Mars is about $$34$$ million miles.
Write each number in standard form: The total weight of an aircraft carrier is $$204$$ million pounds.
Round to the nearest ten: $$157 .$$
Round to the nearest ten: $$884 .$$
Round to the nearest hundred: $$17,852 .$$
Round to the nearest hundred: $$4,951 .$$
Round to the nearest thousand: $$63,921 .$$
Round to the nearest thousand: $$156,437 .$$
